sprints.title: Onboard ShannonBrayNC Lantern repositories into sprint registry

completion_tests.name: ShannonBrayNC Lantern repo visibility confirmed
completion_tests.evidence_required: Issue #17 records which ShannonBrayNC Lantern repositories are visible to the connector.

completion_tests.name: repo registry updated
completion_tests.evidence_required: Each visible ShannonBrayNC Lantern repository is enabled in config/repositories.json, while unavailable repositories remain disabled with an onboarding note.

done_definition: Visible ShannonBrayNC Lantern repositories are enabled in the registry.
Each enabled repository has at least one measurable sprint.
Unavailable repositories remain represented as onboarding work instead of being silently ignored.

sprints.title: Enable main-branch ruleset and GitHub security controls

completion_tests.name: main branch rejects direct pushes
completion_tests.evidence_required: Issue comment or review note confirming direct push protection is active.

completion_tests.name: required checks configured
completion_tests.evidence_required: Issue comment listing required checks for Repository baseline, Python validation, and CodeQL.

done_definition: All acceptance criteria on issue #6 are checked or explicitly documented as unavailable.
Default branch is current after completion.

sprints.title: Accept or revise RFC-0002 canonical hashing and replay semantics

completion_tests.name: RFC-0002 status is updated
completion_tests.evidence_required: RFC status is changed from Draft to Accepted or a review note explains remaining blockers.

done_definition: RFC-0002 acceptance criteria are satisfied or converted to follow-up issues.

sprints.title: Close out RFC-0001 tracking issue

completion_tests.name: RFC-0001 deliverables verified
completion_tests.evidence_required: Issue comment links merged RFC, schema, vectors, and validation harness.

done_definition: Issue #2 is closed as completed or updated with explicit remaining work.

sprints.title: Review organization community-health defaults

completion_tests.name: community health files exist
completion_tests.evidence_required: Confirm profile README, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, SUPPORT, CODE_OF_CONDUCT, PR template, and issue templates exist.

done_definition: Missing or mismatched defaults are fixed or represented as issues.
Default branch is current after changes.
